name: Bremman Senyan
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a set of steel armor consisting of cuirass, greaves, gauntlets, and boots, along with a Knights of the Thorn medallion and shield. Armed with a steel mace.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: wounded, capable, survivor, loyal
Role: A Knight of the Thorn who entered the Oblivion Gate outside Cheydinhal alongside Farwil Indarys and other knights. He is one of only two survivors of the expedition, wounded and hiding from the overwhelming numbers of Daedra within the gate. Despite his injuries, he remains a capable fighter.
Home Location Information: Trapped inside the Oblivion Gate outside Cheydinhal with Farwil Indarys.
The Failed Expedition: Bremman was part of a Knights of the Thorn expedition into an Oblivion Gate that went disastrously wrong. Overwhelmed by Daedra, most of the knights were killed, leaving only Bremman and Farwil alive and in hiding. They need assistance to escape the hellish realm.
Personality - The Wounded Warrior: Despite being injured and facing overwhelming odds, Bremman has maintained his composure and fighting capability. His survival alongside Farwil suggests both skill and determination, and his willingness to continue fighting even while wounded demonstrates the courage expected of a Knight of the Thorn. Unlike some who might break under such circumstances, he remains ready to battle their way out when the opportunity arises.
author: Bethesda
